015 */
016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.jsonrpc;
017
018import io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.BackpressureStrategy;
019import io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.Flowable;
020import io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.Observable;
021import io.reactivex.rxjava3.disposables.Disposable;
022import io.reactivex.rxjava3.processors.BehaviorProcessor;
023import io.reactivex.rxjava3.processors.FlowableProcessor;
024import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.ChainTip;
025import org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.BitcoinClient;
026import org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.ChainTipClient;
027import org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.ChainTipPublisher;
028import org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.ChainTipService;
029import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.JsonRpcStatusException;
030import org.consensusj.rx.jsonrpc.RxJsonRpcClient;
031import org.reactivestreams.Publisher;
032import org.slf4j.Logger;
033import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
034
035import java.io.Closeable;
036import java.io.IOError;
037import java.io.IOException;
038import java.util.List;
039import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
040import java.util.concurrent.Flow;
041import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
042
043// TODO: Rewrite using ScheduledThreadExecutor (instead of an Observable interval) and SubmissionPublisher instead of FlowableProcessor.
044//  Then we can merge it into BitcoinClient (as a default component.)
045//  We may need to use atomic object (or something else?) to replace distinctUntilChanged
046/**
047 * Provides {@link ChainTipService} a using a {@link BitcoinClient} and a polling interval.
048 * This can be used as a fallback if ZeroMQ is not available.
049 */
050public class PollingChainTipServiceImpl implements ChainTipService, ChainTipClient, RxJsonRpcClient, Closeable {
051    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(PollingChainTipServiceImpl.class);
052    private final BitcoinClient client;
053    private final Observable<Long> interval;
054    // How will we properly use backpressure here?
055    private final Flowable<ChainTip> chainTipSource;
056    private Disposable chainTipSubscription;
057    private final FlowableProcessor<ChainTip> chainTipProcessor = BehaviorProcessor.create();
058
059    /**
060     * Construct from a {@link BitcoinClient} or subclass and a polling interval
061     * @param bitcoinClient a client instance
062     * @param interval a polling interval
063     */
064    public PollingChainTipServiceImpl(BitcoinClient bitcoinClient, Observable<Long> interval) {
065        client = bitcoinClient;
066        this.interval = interval;
067        log.info("Constructing polling ChainTipService: {}, {}", client.getNetwork().id(), client.getServerURI());
068        chainTipSource = Flowable.fromPublisher(pollForDistinctChainTip());
069    }
070
071    public PollingChainTipServiceImpl(BitcoinClient bitcoinClient) {
072        this(bitcoinClient, Observable.interval(2,10, TimeUnit.SECONDS));
073    }
074
075    public synchronized void start() {
076        if (chainTipSubscription == null) {
077            chainTipSubscription = chainTipSource.subscribe(chainTipProcessor::onNext, chainTipProcessor::onError, chainTipProcessor::onComplete);
078        }
079    }
080
081    @Override
082    public ChainTipPublisher chainTipPublisher() {
083        start();
084        return ChainTipPublisher.of(chainTipProcessor);
085    }
086
087    /**
088     * Provide a polling interval
089     *
090     * @return polling interval with desired frequency for polling for new ChainTips.
091     */
092    public Observable<Long> getPollingInterval() {
093        return interval;
094    }
095
096    /**
097     * Using a polling interval provided by {@link #getPollingInterval()} provide a
098     * stream of distinct {@link ChainTip}s.
099     *
100     * @return A stream of distinct {@code ChainTip}s.
101     */
102    Publisher<ChainTip> pollForDistinctChainTip() {
103        return getPollingInterval()
104                // ERROR backpressure strategy is compatible with BehaviorProcessor since it subscribes to MAX items
105                .toFlowable(BackpressureStrategy.ERROR)
106                .doOnNext(t -> log.debug("got interval"))
107                .flatMap(t -> this.currentChainTipMaybe())
108                .doOnNext(tip -> log.debug("blockheight, blockhash = {}, {}", tip.getHeight(), tip.getHash()))
109                .distinctUntilChanged(ChainTip::getHash)
110                .doOnNext(tip -> log.info("** NEW ** blockheight, blockhash = {}, {}", tip.getHeight(), tip.getHash()));
111    }
112
113    /**
114     * Get the active chain tip if there is one (useful for polling clients)
115     *
116     * @return The active ChainTip if available (onSuccess) otherwise onComplete (if not available) or onError (if error occurred)
117     */
118    private Publisher<ChainTip> currentChainTipMaybe() {
119        return Flowable.fromPublisher(pollOnceAsPublisher(client::getChainTipsAsync, TransientErrorFilter.of(this::isTransientError, this::logError)))
120                .mapOptional(ChainTip::findActiveChainTip);
121    }
122
123    @Override
124    public void close() {
125        chainTipSubscription.dispose();
126    }
127
128    @Override
129    public CompletableFuture<List<ChainTip>> getChainTipsAsync() {
130        return client.getChainTipsAsync();
131    }
132
133    @Override
134    @Deprecated
135    public List<ChainTip> getChainTips() throws JsonRpcStatusException, IOException {
136        return client.syncGet(client.getChainTipsAsync());
137    }
138
139    private boolean isTransientError(Throwable t) {
140        return t instanceof IOError;
141    }
142    private void logError(Throwable throwable) {
143        log.error("Exception in RPCCall", throwable);
144    }
145}
